title: Create: More Features
description: This addon adds new professions for villagers, new mechanisms, removed items from Create, new auto farms, new decor and devices!
body:
### OLD TRAILER!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M4GDvL_C1dk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>




##
# **Description:**

### **New villagers professions:**
In total, there are currently 10 professions in the modification!

Remember, each profession requires a special block!

<Confectioner> - Buys and sells various sweets and their components!

<Engineer> - Buys and sells brass mechanisms and components!

<Trackman> - Sells railway components and mechanisms!

<Lineman> - Sells railway mechanisms and components of the latest game development!

<Plumber> - Buys and sells Copper Age items, a fan of water structures!

<Postman> - A postman and part-time dealer in all things related to the latest Create update!

<Constructor> - Having received the blueprints for the contraptions, he began mass-producing them! Time to stock up!

<Mechanic> - Need mechanisms? Complex contraptions? Selling unwanted items? You've come to the right place!

<Sundries Trader> - A seller of all sorts of things, and with a sense of humor!

<???> - Who is this?




### **New building blocks and decorations:**
- Decorative Railway Casing

! More decor will be added in the update !

### **New auto farms:**
- Automatic coal/diamond/graphite farm from graphite

- Red Sandstone Copper Farm

- Deepslate auto farm

- Auto farm of graphite from the same deepslate

- Auto farm lapis lazuli

- Automatic farm for saltpeter, sulfur and coal

! Soon: 
- Automatic farm of gunpowder from saltpeter, sulfur and coal pieces
- Auto farm for duplicating netzerak from netzerala
- Automatic granite farm from nezeralava
- Red sand auto farm from granite auto farm
!

### **New items:**
- Graphite - a new material obtained from deep shale, is a fuel, but only burns if the number of items is >10 in a stack, you can create a diamond from it
- Saltpeter, sulfur and coal pieces are craft components

! Soon: 
- Exquisite Radiance and Shadow Ingot - End-game resources, crafting components
- A set of exquisite radiance - more powerful tools than netherite ones, in the future it is planned to expand the functionality depending on the wishes of the community
- Multi buckets - these items are reusable buckets, they can be upgraded
- Antioxidant
!


### **Block mechanisms:**
- Dimmable rose quartz lamp
- Rotation Recorder
- Vibration Blocker


! Soon: 
- Velcro - a block that greatly slows down entities, preventing them from jumping, but is not attached like a slime block
- Flying block - a block that does not require a base to install; when the block is destroyed, it immediately goes into the player’s inventory

### Rest:

- Sulfur ore - used for additional sulfur production


##
### Future innovations:
<<The re-creation is complete. New mechanisms and items have been added!>>
